message:
fix(daemon): eliminate channel leak in select loop via pre-allocated nil channels (bd-7)

Replace inline IIFEs that called make(chan time.Time) on every select
iteration (when remoteSyncTicker or fallbackTicker was nil) with
pre-allocated channel variables. A nil channel blocks forever in select,
providing the same never-fire behavior without allocating garbage on
each iteration of the long-running daemon loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/ruby
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
